title: Speech Recognition Timer Memory Leaks
essence: Multiple timeout/restart timers not properly cleaned up causing memory leaks and race conditions
symptoms: Browser memory usage increases during long chat sessions
Speech recognition becomes unresponsive over time
repro_steps: Let session run for extended period (10+ minutes)
root_cause: Multiple timer refs (debounceTimerRef, restartTimerRef) not consistently cleared, and recognition lifecycle not properly managed
do_not_do: Create timers without cleanup in useEffect
Start new recognition before stopping previous
guardrails: Always clear timers in useEffect cleanup
Add memory leak detection in development
prevent_tests: Verify timer cleanup on component unmount

evidence.notes: Affects users with long chat sessions - gradual performance degradation
